result.answer:
It does not meet the contract.

The retry part is satisfied: `recommendationClient.get()` does not implicitly retry, so the request path will not retry this call.

The deadline part is not satisfied: `recommendationClient.get()` has no default deadline, and this function does not set one. In the slow-provider case, checkout may wait longer than 150 ms instead of degrading to `{ kind: "unavailable" }`.

Smallest correction before merge: add an explicit 150 ms per-call timeout/deadline on this outbound request and keep the fallback to `{ kind: "unavailable" }`. For example, pass an `AbortSignal.timeout(150)` or the client’s equivalent timeout option to `recommendationClient.get(...)`. No retry change is needed.
